items.claim: Mike Davis is faster, cleaner, and hits harder in the boxing department compared to Naru Ali.
items.quote: Mike Davis is faster, he's cleaner, he hits harder.

items.claim: Nurulo Ali was not able to take down Shemrock.
items.quote: I've watched Nurulo Ali not be able to take down Shemrock of all people.

items.claim: Naru Ali's striking is still a work in progress and he whiffs on many punches.
items.quote: Nuo Ali striking is still very much a work in progress. He still very much is whiffing on a lot of punches.

items.claim: Mike Davis has shown the ability to put people away with his power.
items.quote: Mike Davis, I've seen him put people away.

items.claim: Naru Ali is very linear in his movement.
items.quote: Nulo Ali being so linear is going to feel some of that power.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking the fight on short notice.
items.quote: Cody Gibson actually taking this fight on short notice.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's long limbs pose issues and make it difficult to grapple him on the mat.
items.quote: those long limbs can cause problems, pose issues potentially on the mat.
